summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.manager; import java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap; import java.util.Map; public class OllamaManager { private static final OllamaManager INSTANCE = new OllamaManager(); private final Map<String, OllamaService> services = new ConcurrentHashMap<>(); private OllamaManager() {} public static OllamaManager getInstance() { return INSTANCE; } public OllamaService getService(String url) { String key = (url != null && !url.isEmpty()) ? url : "http://localhost:11434"; if (key.endsWith("/")) { key = key.substring(0, key.length() - 1); } return services.computeIfAbsent(key, k -> new OllamaService(k, null)); } public void removeService(String url) { if (url != null) { services.remove(url);
